entries.summary: Phase 4 Frontend Import UI complete — implemented navigation shell, landing page, CSV import page, and managed club settings using Architectural Editorial design system
lessons_learned: Always import `invoke` from @tauri-apps/api/core and call Tauri commands as `invoke('command_name', { args })` — not as direct function imports
Svelte layouts require `<slot />` to render child routes — without it, child pages render nothing
Drag-and-drop HTML5 API only provides basename, not absolute path — when using Tauri dialogs, redirect drops to the dialog to get full paths
Svelte 5 $effect without reactive dependencies runs on mount, but `onMount` is more idiomatic for initialization-only logic
